title: Evaluate Triage Patterns
description: Schema for evaluate-triage-patterns.json (#2289). Drift between this schema and the data file must fail CI. The promotes_to enum is deliberately closed — adding a new value requires a schema bump and a helper-script update.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Logged in the run log when a triage promotion fires.

match.description: Regex pattern (JavaScript flavor) matched against a Not-Verified bullet's text.

suggestion.description: Read-only command template the evaluator should run. May contain {placeholders} the evaluator substitutes from the claim text.

promotes_to.description: Closed enum declaring what the triage result means. Adding a new value requires bumping this schema AND updating triage-not-verified.js AND mark-evaluate-task.js. This closure is intentional — it prevents typos like 'veryfied_if_nonempty' from slipping through.

notes.description: Optional human-readable explanation of when the pattern fires and how the evaluator should interpret the suggestion output.
